parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.number,
  t.created,
  t.closed,
  COALESCE(d.subject, '') AS subject,
  GROUP_CONCAT(
    CASE WHEN te.type = 'M' THEN te.body END
    ORDER BY te.id ASC SEPARATOR '\n---\n'
  ) AS question,
  GROUP_CONCAT(
    CASE WHEN te.type = 'R' THEN te.body END
    ORDER BY te.id ASC SEPARATOR '\n---\n'
  ) AS solution
FROM ost_ticket t
JOIN ost_ticket__cdata d ON d.ticket_id = t.id
JOIN ost_thread_entry te ON te.thread_id = t.thread_id
WHERE
  t.status_id = 3
  AND t.closed > NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
GROUP BY t.id, t.number, t.created, t.closed, d.subject
HAVING solution IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY t.closed DESC
LIMIT 100

meta.description: Liest täglich um 02:00 Uhr gelöste osTicket-Tickets der letzten 7 Tage direkt aus MySQL. Pro Ticket: HTML bereinigen → Ollama Embedding → Qdrant upsert (Collection 'osticket_solutions') + NLP-Analyse → Neo4j indexieren. Benötigt: MySQL-Credential 'osTicket DB', Qdrant-Collection 'osticket_solutions' (Dimension 768 für nomic-embed-text).
